cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'API Gateway Patterns for Salesforce'. Subtitle in white: 'When MuleSoft is not the answer: edge gateways, BFFs, GraphQL, events, and direct APIs'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Client & Agent Channels' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'LWC Apps', 'Mobile Apps', 'Agentforce 2.0 Actions' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'Gateway & Policy Layer' vivid purple border — modules 'Auth', 'Rate Limits', 'Routing', 'Request Shaping' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Salesforce Platform APIs' vivid teal/green border — modules 'REST v64.0', 'GraphQL CRUD', 'Conditional Composite', 'Platform Events' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'API Gateway Decision Point' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'MuleSoft' and 'Alternatives'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Design Flow' → 'Policy Need' → 'Data Shape' → 'Scale Profile' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce API Gateway Anti-Pattern'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Pass-through gateway that adds latency but no value'. Subtitle 'If your gateway only forwards REST calls, question the design'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Extra Hop with stopwatch icon', 'Duplicated Auth with lock icon', 'No Contract Ownership with broken-link icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Pass-through wrapper' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Policy gateway' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `app.post('/account', async (req) => fetch(sf + '/services/data/v64.0/sobjects/Account', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(req.body) }))`, right column green border '// GOOD' code: `validateJwt(req); enforceQuota(clientId); validateSchema(accountCreateSchema, req.body); routeToSalesforce('/services/data/v64.0/graphql')`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Own the contract', 'Enforce policy', 'Measure latency'. Footer bar: 'A gateway must earn its hop'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce API Gateway Scale Controls'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Design for 1K, 100K, and 10M requests'. Subtitle 'Gateway controls must change as traffic grows'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K: Correlation IDs with trace icon', '100K: Quotas and retries with throttle icon', '10M: Split traffic classes with shard icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: unlimited client retries' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: bounded retry and circuit breaker' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `while(true){ await fetch('/salesforce/account'); }`, right column green border '// GOOD' code: `retry({ attempts: 3, backoffMs: [250,1000,3000], circuitBreaker: 'salesforce-read' })`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Throttle per client', 'Cache reference reads', 'Move propagation to events'. Footer bar: 'At 10M, every retry is architecture'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
